on

The Super Falcons of Nigeria will host the Banyana Banyana of South Africa in the first leg of the 2024 Olympic Games final round qualifier on, Friday, April 1, 2024.

The encounter will hold at the Moshood Abiola Stadium, Abuja.

The reverse fixture will take place at the Mbombela Stadium, Mpumalanga eight days later.

The overall winners will seal a place at the Paris 2024 Games.

The Super Eagles are looking to make a return to the Olympics after a 16-year absence.

South Africa on the other hand have failed to qualify for the last two editions of the games.

Paris, France will host the 2024 Olympics between July 26 and August 11, 2024.
